core_mechanism: A diffusion-type (Fokker–Planck) partial differential equation describing how the probability density of a field variable evolves as a continuous scale/resolution parameter is increased — a multi-scale coarse-graining flow in which resolving progressively finer scales broadens the distribution diffusively.
brief_reason: The abstract frames the method as a multi-scale stochastic-process model whose central step is solving the probability density of the contact pressure and interfacial gap via partial differential equations as finer scales are included.
